name: offload-fanout-example
description: §7 acceptance example: safe fan-out + patch escape + tamper-detecting audit bundle. Runnable real-Docker demo (src/index.ts) + deterministic CI smoke test (test/fanout.test.ts).

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict src/index.ts test/fanout.test.ts
